texto: When it all comes crashing downTry to understand your meaningsNo one said it would be easyThis living, it ain't easy, ohYou were sewn togetherwith a tapestry of moleculesA billion baby galaxiesand wide open spacesAnd everything you need is hereEverything you fear is hereAnd it's holding you upIt just keeps holding you upWhen you came up from the groundFrom a million little piecesYou're a pretty human being
explicacao: Citação de Cloud Cult sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “When it all comes crashing downTry to understand your meaningsNo one said it would be easyThis li…” articula vida, acceptance, inspiracional em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.
